spec.title: Total Cost
spec.description: Claude Code estimated spend over selected time range.

spec.title: Total Sessions
spec.description: Claude Code sessions started over selected time range.

spec.title: Total Tokens
spec.description: All Claude Code tokens across input, output, and cache classes.

spec.title: Active Time
spec.description: Combined CLI and user active time over selected range.

spec.title: Commits
spec.description: Git commits credited by Claude Code telemetry.

spec.title: Net LOC
spec.description: Lines added minus removed over selected range.

spec.expr: ((sum(increase(claude_code_lines_of_code_count_total{organization_id=~"${organization_id:regex}",user_email=~"${user_email:regex}",terminal_type=~"${terminal_type:regex}",type="added"}[$__range])) or on() vector(0)) - (sum(increase(claude_code_lines_of_code_count_total{organization_id=~"${organization_id:regex}",user_email=~"${user_email:regex}",terminal_type=~"${terminal_type:regex}",type="removed"}[$__range])) or on() vector(0)))

spec.title: Edit Accept Rate
spec.description: Accepted code-edit decisions as a percentage of all recorded decisions.

spec.expr: 100 * ((sum(increase(claude_code_code_edit_tool_decision_total{organization_id=~"${organization_id:regex}",user_email=~"${user_email:regex}",terminal_type=~"${terminal_type:regex}",tool_name=~"${tool_name:regex}",language=~"${language:regex}",decision="accept"}[$__range])) or on() vector(0)) / clamp_min((sum(increase(claude_code_code_edit_tool_decision_total{organization_id=~"${organization_id:regex}",user_email=~"${user_email:regex}",terminal_type=~"${terminal_type:regex}",tool_name=~"${tool_name:regex}",language=~"${language:regex}"}[$__range])) or on() vector(0)), 1))

spec.title: Tool Decisions
spec.description: All edit-tool accept/reject decisions over selected range.

spec.title: Cost by Model
spec.description: Spend trend broken down by Claude model.

spec.title: Lines Added vs Removed
spec.description: Code churn attributed to Claude Code.

spec.title: Cost by Query Source
spec.description: Main, auxiliary, and subagent spend mix.

spec.title: Token Usage by Model
spec.description: Token growth broken down by Claude model.

spec.title: Tool Decisions by Language
spec.description: Accepted and rejected edits by language.
